nasb.text: When the captains of the chariots saw that it was not the king of Israel, they turned back from pursuing him.

esv.text: For as soon as the captains of the chariots saw that it was not the king of Israel, they turned back from pursuing him.

cnv.text: 眾戰車隊長見他不是以色列王，就轉回去，不再追擊他了。

ccb.text: 战车长见他不是以色列王，便不再追杀他。
